subcodes.first_line: O scion of the illustrious Uncle, praise be to God that in that household a soul was raised in the fullness of faith and certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل عم جلیل حمد خدا را که در آنخاندان نفسی در کمال ایمان و ایقان مبعوث شد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
